calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-19-303030 In Re: Julius John Giannotti and
PES-19-303039 In Re: Anita Virginia Giannotti.

Appearances: Gordon Giannotti in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that the Grandfather's death certificate reflects the place of birth as San Francisco and that the other document show California as the place of birth, and that in contrast there is nothing in the records for Grandmother saying that she was born in San Francisco. Mr. Giannotti stated that he needs this because he is applying for Italian Citizenship by descent. The Court informed Mr. Giannotti that it is prepared to grant the petition as to the Grandfather because the death certificate shows the place of birth as San Francisco and continue the Grandmother's petition to see if he can get anything that indicates that the Grandmother was born in San Francisco. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth of Julius John Giannotti (subject to review of the order). The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth of Anita Virginia Giannotti is continued to December 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
